context: Tests whether the agent writes a Benchee benchmark that follows key best-practice instructions: running in production-like conditions, comparing multiple approaches, using multi-sized inputs, configuring proper warmup and time, measuring memory and reductions, and enabling comparison output.

checklist.name: MIX_ENV=prod comment
checklist.description: The script includes a comment or instruction indicating it should be run with MIX_ENV=prod (e.g. 'MIX_ENV=prod mix run bench/string_ops_benchmark.exs')

checklist.name: At least 2 approaches
checklist.description: Benchee.run/2 defines at least 2 distinct implementations being compared

checklist.name: Small input defined
checklist.description: The inputs: map includes a key whose value is a list or string of small size (e.g. 100 elements or fewer)

checklist.name: Medium input defined
checklist.description: The inputs: map includes a key whose value is a list or string of medium size (e.g. around 1_000–10_000 elements)

checklist.name: Large input defined
checklist.description: The inputs: map includes a key whose value is a list or string of large size (e.g. 50_000+ elements)

checklist.name: warmup: 2
checklist.description: Benchee.run/2 options include warmup: 2 (or a value >= 2)

checklist.name: time: 10
checklist.description: Benchee.run/2 options include time: 10 (or a value >= 10)

checklist.name: memory_time configured
checklist.description: Benchee.run/2 options include memory_time: 2 (or any positive value)

checklist.name: reduction_time configured
checklist.description: Benchee.run/2 options include reduction_time: 2 (or any positive value)

checklist.name: Console comparison: true
checklist.description: The formatters list includes {Benchee.Formatters.Console, comparison: true} or comparison: true inside the Console formatter options

checklist.name: File named correctly
checklist.description: The benchmark script is saved as bench/string_ops_benchmark.exs (correct directory and filename)
